hero.subheadline: Nebutra Sailor is a Next.js SaaS framework engineered for AI founders. It natively integrates Agent orchestration, multi-modal capabilities, and an enterprise-level monetization suite, turning AI concepts into scalable commercial products—not just technical demos.

features.sectionTitle: Out-of-the-box infrastructure, from prototype to scale.

item0.title: AI Application Infrastructure
item0.description: Built-in, production-tested Agent Frameworks and LLM orchestration engines. Bypass complex underlying abstractions and interact directly with structured intelligence APIs.

item1.title: Open Product Community (OPC)
item1.description: Future AI products require ecosystems, not silos. Designed with the OPC philosophy to provide standardized plugin structures connecting creators with developer networks.

item2.title: Enterprise SaaS Automation
item2.description: Deeply integrating the modern tech stack of Vercel, Supabase, and Stripe. Provides out-of-the-box row-level security, complex multi-tenant isolation, and global subscription billing.

about.title: About Us — Nebutra Intelligence
about.description: Discover the commercial vision and core engineering principles driving Nebutra Intelligence.
about.heading: Company Overview
about.subheading: A leading provider of AI Native & OPC Infrastructure solutions.
about.missionP1: Nebutra Intelligence is dedicated to eliminating the engineering friction between experimental AI prototypes and fully commercialized products. We deliver standardized AI Application Infrastructure and SaaS tooling, allowing developers to focus purely on business logic rather than underlying operational complexities.
about.missionP2: Guided by the Open Product Community (OPC) philosophy, we believe that next-generation AI products represent a dense intersection of rigorous code architecture, hacker culture, and expansive developer networks.

0.title: System-Level Engineering
0.description: Constructing software with a stringent systems engineering mindset. We ship only heavily tested, fault-tolerant architectures, rejecting fragile, experimental demos.

1.title: Production Readiness
1.description: No compromises. Every system component is forged in high-concurrency, authentic commercial environments to guarantee sustained enterprise-grade performance.

2.title: Open Source Innovation
2.description: Transparency creates trust. By open-sourcing our core infrastructure, we enable global technical experts to audit and iterate upon our logic, accelerating architectural evolution.

3.title: Inviolable Security
3.description: From the very first line of code, our architecture defaults to enforcement of Row-Level Security (RLS), transit encryption, and comprehensive system auditing.

4.title: Developer Velocity
4.description: R&D efficiency is a critical product metric. We relentlessly optimize for low API latency, elegant interfaces, and highly structured technical documentation.

5.title: Continuous Delivery
5.description: Deploying agile iteration protocols. We establish rapid feedback loops through rigorous testing and frequent deployments, scaling the product capabilities responsively.

faq.title: Engineering Guidance & FAQ — Nebutra
faq.description: Comprehensive analysis of framework architecture, baseline topologies, and commercial deployment strategies.
faq.heading: Executive Deep Dive
faq.subheading: Supporting material optimized for systems engineering integration and executive commercial decision-making.

0.q: What is the explicit operational purpose of Nebutra Sailor?
0.a: Nebutra Sailor is a highly structured, production-ready Next.js AI SaaS framework. It bundles microservice functionalities, including corporate billing, multi-factor authentication, and multi-tenant isolation, eliminating boilerplate development overhead and allowing teams to hyper-focus on core structural AI implementation.

1.q: How is the repository licensing structured?
1.a: The underlying infrastructure strictly enforces the OSS AGPLv3 agreement, guaranteeing transparency and zero-cost usage. For organizations necessitating proprietary obfuscation and elevated rewrite guarantees, explicit closed-source commercial contracts are available.

2.q: What is the speed of initial commercial evaluation?
2.a: Extremely high-velocity. Using our customized Node CLI toolchain alongside the precise technical specification, a junior engineer can stand up an autonomous local Minimum Viable Product (MVP) instance within single-digit minutes.

0.q: How wide is the tolerance for commercial scaling?
0.a: Designed heavily on micro-component paradigms, structural load capacity maps seamlessly from zero-demand Free Tiers dynamically up to Enterprise thresholds serving multi-million monthly requests, entirely configured via dashboard constraints.

1.q: How does subscription volatility affect standard accounting?
1.a: We operate utilizing precise, second-level structural logging of resources and API throughput. Shifting constraints instantly reconciles against the accounting layer—either refunding prorated differentials or issuing automatic credits. There is absolutely no tier-freeze period.

2.q: What processing infrastructure isolates payment vectors?
2.a: Global cash routing fundamentally defers to Stripe server interfaces, guaranteeing strict PCI-DSS telemetry and processing integrity. Enterprise deployments may integrate private financial audit pipelines governed by custom SLA commitments.

0.q: Which fundamental intelligence abstractions are supported natively?
0.a: The primary interaction logic dictates native interoperability over OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini standard specifications. This yields massive flexibility to hot-swap reasoning endpoints efficiently via variable mapping with zero degradation to the upstream commercial logic.

1.q: How is the risk of database obfuscation addressed?
1.a: Implementation defaults intrinsically deploy Postgres Row-Level Security (RLS) policies tightly coupled with our serverless Tenant Resolution Routing primitives. This ensures hard partitions actively prevent critical application-level data contamination and execution overlap.

2.q: Are there architectural restrictions on self-managed deployments?
2.a: Absolutely none. The topology is fully decoupled. If the environment executes independent Node.js runtimes alongside healthy PostgreSQL clusters, full functionality is inherently preserved.

0.q: What protocols determine the perimeter's mechanical defense?
0.a: Mechanisms execute mandatory TLS encryption through transmission, deterministic hashing algorithms for secrets mapping, and the ubiquitous recording of mutation events written strictly into internal time-series tracking ledgers.

1.q: Does the topology respect major international privacy statutes?
1.a: Yes, profoundly. Business modules supply out-of-the-box algorithmic implementations targeting consent withdrawal states, hard-deletion logic, and deep export queries conforming optimally to the GDPR and localized regulatory frameworks.

2.q: What executes upon an anomalous catastrophic incident?
2.a: Automated sentinels instantly alert core engineering vectors who force circuit blocks and implement swift triage. Governed by an advanced resolution handbook, fully transparent Incident Postmortems are universally disseminated within an absolute 72-hour window.

0.q: How is operational bottleneck troubleshooting resolved?
0.a: Initial triage vectors target the rigorously maintained and peer-reviewed documentation matrix and verified community interactions. Procuring a standard or enterprise-level license decrypts access to private escalation queues resolving through direct internal engineering nodes.

1.q: Do you extend physical or specialized environmental integration operations?
1.a: This falls under our bespoke premium execution tier for upper-echelon corporate conglomerates. Our most senior architects deploy outly to perform code auditing against legacy architecture, manage delicate cloud relocations, and validate highly isolated network partitions.
